task_objective: Escape </script> sequences in inlined JS assets (Issue #14)
design_decisions: Used .replace('</script', '<\\/script') to escape script closing tags in inlined JS content.
Applied escaping within the vendor asset inlining loop in to_html().
Ensured the escaping is safe for JS execution while preventing HTML parser breakouts.
results: Successfully implemented escaping. Verified with regression tests and full test suite. PR #19 opened.
